title: codereview-P3-pass2: no test for large logs or memory usage in analyze-hetero-fleet.py
description: P3: No test for the large test case mentioned in bead. Add test_large_log_memory() that generates a 50MB log with many TELEMETRY lines and asserts peak memory < 100MB using memory_profiler or resource module. Also test gateway/console parsing if logs contain console output. Follows test integrity rules - no contrived oracles.
